chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1290 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, which prima facie reflects that petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
